tags.name: Чыгуначная вуліца
tags.note: ulica Zaliznyczna sounds Ukrainian, not Polish. In Polish, it's "Kolejowa" (from "kolej")

tags.name: Прыазёрная вуліца
tags.note: In Polish, ulica Przyozerska sounds like martian. Please use "Nadjeziorna". Thank you.
